title: Manufacturing Engineer - Berger Paints - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Berger Paints - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Berger Paints is actively seeking a talented and motivated Manufacturing Engineer to join our dynamic team in Vadodara. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Berger Paints:
Berger Paints is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in SolidWorks

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Berger Paints!
